title: Best Christmas Markets in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: Berlin's Christmas market season for 2026 officially kicks off on **November 23, 2026**, with early openings like **Lichtenberger Winterzeit** (Oct 31) and the **RAW Medieval Market** (Nov 12).

**WeihnachtsZauber Gendarmenmarkt** is returning to Gendarmenmarkt in 2026 (after years at Bebelplatz during renovations), featuring high-end crafts, gourmet food, and a €2 entry fee (free on weekdays before 2 PM).
For a classic/family atmosphere, the **Berliner Weihnachtszeit am Roten Rathaus** features a Neptune Fountain ice rink and a giant Ferris wheel, running from November 23, 2026 to January 3, 2027.
For unique alternative vibes, visit the Scandinavian-themed **Lucia Christmas Market**, the riverside **Heissa Holzmarkt**, or the **Klunkerkranich** rooftop market.

Key tourist tips: always carry **cash** (many stalls do not accept cards), expect to pay a **Pfand** (deposit) of €3-5 on mugs, and don't skip the **Handbrot** (stuffed hot bread) or **Glühwein** (mulled wine).
